title: Dreamy Rich Filipino Noodles Pancit Bihon
description: A rich and creamy Filipino noodle dish featuring a sweet and savory jam-based sauce, perfect for a lazy Sunday meal, made with halal-friendly ingredients and a tadka twist, in the form of traditional pancit bihon.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large wok or frying pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the ginger jam, soy sauce, fish sauce, and lime juice, and stir well to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the rice noodles to the pan, stirring to coat with the sauce.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the noodles to a serving platter and garnish with chopped scallions.
